unit: Unit 12: Everyday Life with Your Computer
title: QR Codes and Voice Assistants
drDigitalIntro:
QR codes and voice assistants make things quick.
• A QR code is a square pattern — point your camera at it to open a link.
• A voice assistant answers questions and sets timers when you talk to it.
• Activate it by its wake word or by clicking its icon.

playgroundTask.question: At a restaurant, your paper menu is replaced with a QR code. How do you view the menu?

options.text: Open your phone Camera app and point it at the QR code
Scan it with your computerBook's webcam in the file manager
Ask the waiter to email it to you

drDigitalSuccess: Your phone Camera app scans QR codes automatically — just point and tap the link that appears!
drDigitalHint: Which device always has a camera with you and can scan QR codes instantly?
